place: Ban Tai, Bang Por, Ko Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Ang Thong Sunset Villa with Infinity Pool - Bang Por
blurb: A contemporary three-bedroom, four-bathroom sea view villa on the north-west coast of Koh Samui at Bang Por, completed in 2021. An infinity pool and wide terraces look out over panoramic ocean views of the Ang Thong islands and the island's best west-coast sunsets. Sold fully furnished and turnkey on a freehold Chanote title — 320 m² built on a 700 m² plot. Was ฿23,900,000. Now ฿18,900,000.
detail:
Set on the hillside at Bang Por, on the quiet and increasingly sought-after north-west coast of Koh Samui, this contemporary villa was completed in 2021 and is offered fully furnished and turnkey. A striking twin-gable form in crisp white frames uninterrupted views over the Gulf to the Ang Thong archipelago, with sunsets that draw straight down into the sea.

The living level is open-plan and wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass, so the ocean is present from the moment you step inside; living, dining and kitchen flow out to generous terraces made for sunset lounging and stargazing. An infinity pool sits on the edge of the view, mirroring the sky.

Three en-suite bedrooms and four bathrooms are finished in the same clean, modern palette, with built-in storage throughout. The home has performed strongly as a rental — recent nightly rates of roughly USD 400–800 and an indicative yield around 11% — making it a turnkey holiday home or income-producing investment.

The land is 700 m² with 320 m² of built area, held on a freehold Chanote (with PBT5) title and served by government electricity and water. Bang Por is known for its tranquil sandy shores, clear water and laid-back, upscale atmosphere — moments from luxury resorts, beach restaurants and wellness retreats, and a short drive to Nathon, Fisherman's Village and everyday amenities.

features.l: Infinity pool with panoramic sea views
Ang Thong ocean views & west-coast sunsets
12% historical net ROI · proven income & expense
